examples.sentence: Rain beat against the window all night.
She beat the world champion in straight sets.
examples.translation: 她直落两盘击败了世界冠军。

examples.sentence: You can beat the odds if you refuse to quit.
examples.translation: 只要不放弃，你就能逆转命运。

examples.sentence: My heart still beats faster when I see your name.
examples.translation: 看到你的名字，我的心跳依然加速。
